text: "Josue was old, and far advanced in years"... He was then about one hundred and one years old.—And there is a very large country left, Which is not yet divided by lot. Not yet possessed by the children of Israel.
"The princes of Madian"... It appears from hence that these were subjects of king Sehon: they are said to have been slain with him, that is, about the same time, but not in the same battle.
